title: ServiceAccount
description: ServiceAccount schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE IAM Service API

id.description: Unique identifier of the service account.

name.description: Unique name of the service account within the TSG.

description.description: Description of the service account's purpose.

tsg_id.description: Tenant Service Group ID this service account belongs to.

key_count.description: Number of active credential keys for this service account.
